2603.18577.title: MedForge: Interpretable Medical Deepfake Detection via Forgery-aware Reasoning
2603.18577.paper_summary: Text-guided image editors can now manipulate authentic medical scans with high fidelity, enabling lesion implantation/removal that threatens clinical trust and safety. Existing defenses are inadequate for healthcare. Medical detectors are largely black-box, while MLLM-based explainers are typically post-hoc, lack medical expertise, and may hallucinate evidence on ambiguous cases. We present MedForge, a data-and-method solution for pre-hoc, evidence-grounded medical forgery detection. We introduce MedForge-90K, a large-scale benchmark of realistic lesion edits across 19 pathologies with expert-guided reasoning supervision via doctor inspection guidelines and gold edit locations. Building on it, MedForge-Reasoner performs localize-then-analyze reasoning, predicting suspicious regions before producing a verdict, and is further aligned with Forgery-aware GSPO to strengthen grounding and reduce hallucinations. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art detection accuracy and trustworthy, expert-aligned explanations.
2603.18577.paper_summary_zh: 文本引導的影像編輯器現在可以高保真地操控真實的醫療掃描，實現可能威脅臨床信任和安全的病變植入/移除。現有的防禦措施對於醫療保健來說是不足的。醫療檢測器在很大程度上是黑箱，而基於MLLM的解釋器通常是事後的，缺乏醫學專業知識，並且在模糊案例中可能會產生幻覺證據。我們提出了MedForge，一個基於數據和方法的解決方案，用於前置的、有證據基礎的醫療偽造檢測。我們介紹了MedForge-90K，一個涵蓋19種病理的現實病變編輯的大規模基準，並通過醫生檢查指南和金標編輯位置進行專家引導的推理監督。在此基礎上，MedForge-Reasoner執行定位後分析的推理，在產出判決之前預測可疑區域，並進一步與偽造意識的GSPO對齊，以加強基礎並減少幻覺。實驗顯示出最先進的檢測準確性和可信的、專家對齊的解釋。
2603.18577.author: Zhihui Chen et.al.
2603.18577.authors: Zhihui Chen, Kai He, Qingyuan Lei, Bin Pu, Jian Zhang, Yuling Xu, Mengling Feng
